title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: A practical guide to building good habits and breaking bad ones through small, consistent changes.

title: The Hobbit
author: J. R. R. Tolkien
description: Bilbo Baggins joins a dangerous adventure with dwarves to reclaim a lost kingdom from a dragon.

title: The Martian
author: Andy Weir
description: An astronaut stranded on Mars uses science and creativity to survive and contact Earth.
